arts.ttl: Maddison gives Spurs the lead against Man Utd!
arts.sum: James Maddison puts the hosts in front against Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Amorim admits Amad likely out for rest of season
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim has confirmed star forward Amad Diallo is likely to miss the rest of the season after sustaining a ligament injury in training.

arts.ttl: Tottenham protests against Daniel Levy explained ahead of Manchester United
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur fans are planning a protest against chairman Daniel Levy ahead of the Premier League match against Manchester United on Sunday afternoon. Ahead of the game against United, Spurs sit in 15th place in the Premier League table, having picked up 27 points from their 24 games so far this season.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim expects Amad Diallo to miss rest of the season through injury
arts.sum: The 22-year-old sustained the serious injury in training.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes concerning confirmation over Man United winger Amad Diallo
arts.sum: Manchester United coach Ruben Amorim has confirmed the worst fears about Amad Diallo’s injury – claiming that he’s likely to be out for the season. Over the past 24 hours, reports surfaced suggesting the Ivorian winger had suffered a serious setback – adding to the Red Devils’ growing injury crisis. arts.ttl: Who is Jack Moorhouse? Manchester United teenager in Ruben Amorim squad vs Tottenham Hotspur
arts.sum: The latest Man United news as Ruben Amorim names Jack Moorhouse in his matchday squad to play Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim confirms Man Utd's worst Amad fears have come true after injury blow
arts.sum: Manchester United continue to be hampered by injuries and Amad has joined those on the sidelines with Ruben Amorim admitting the forward will miss the rest of the season

arts.ttl: Tottenham fans turn on Daniel Levy as thousands gather for biggest protest yet against owners
arts.sum: Supporters call for Levy and ENIC to ‘get out of our club’ before Manchester United game

arts.ttl: Man Utd forced to name eight teenagers on bench for Tottenham clash
arts.sum: A luckless run of injuries forced Ruben Amorim into drastic action against Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Tottenham fan group protests against Levy and owners
arts.sum: A fan group called Change for Tottenham leads protests against the club's ownership before Sunday's game against Manchester United.
